pages.text:
8RI LANKA

Animal Production

& Health Division,

Department of Agriculture, Peradeniya,

Gerlon, 12th March, 1971.

DI. ReVittoz,

Director,

Office International Des Epizooties, 12, rue de Prony,

Paris-17€

Dear Dr. Vittoz,

MEMBERSHIF OF THE O.I.E.

I am glad to inform you that the Government

of Ceylon has decided to seek membership of the O.I.I.

I shall be very grateful if you mould, so

good as to send ne the necessary application forma together with details of the procedure that re should follon in applying for nembership.

A copy of the

constitution of the O.I.E. together with any other

Ielovant documents world also be

rolcone..

With kind regards,

Yours sincerely,

Hans auph

A. Bandaranayake,

Deputy Director of Agriculture,

(A.P. & H.)
